title: rubus fasciatus
intro: Rubus fasciatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. Its medicinal properties include its rich content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus fasciatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus fasciatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments.
